channel.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Jun 21st - Jun 27th, 2021
item.description:
Quick Start

  • From Cloud to DevOps to Serverless in under 10 minutes using maps - A basic introduction to change in the IT industry using the concept of Wardley maps by Simon Wardley (9:56).

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Jun 7th - Jun 13th, 2021
item.description:
Apps

Commercial Enterprise Platforms

  • Wemvula - A visual transformation platform that provides the situational awareness to make sense of your interconnected web of needs, ideas, service components, supply contracts and change activities.

    • Apps

    Mapping

  • Mapkeep - Mapkeep is a place to keep 😉 your Wardley Maps. Create, share, and discuss maps with others. Host your maps for free with unlimited public repositories. For updates, you can follow @mapkeep on Twitter, subscribe to the YouTube Channel, or subscribe to the News and Updates blog.

    • Templates

    Mapping

  • Google Slides Mapping Template - Template for Google Slides.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Mar 1st - Mar 7th, 2021
item.description:
Maps in the Wild

  • Gameplay for Data Flow - By James Urquhart. Mar 24, 2017.
  • Uber, the not so disrupting disruptor? - By Simon Wardley. Sep 11, 2017.
  • Blue pill or red pill? - Doctrine and doctrine phases by Simon Wardley. May 25, 2017.
  • Is my diagram a map? - By Simon Wardley. May 12, 2017.
  • Applying doctrine to data flow - By James Urquhart. Feb 4, 2017.
  • Adding Context To The Wardley Map of Data Flow - How do you extract value from the jumble of components and value relationships by James Urquhart. Jan 12, 2017.
  • A Simple Wardley Map of Data Flow - Building a Wardley Map from a value chain for "real time business automation" by James Urquhart. Dec 30, 2016.
  • The data flow value chain - Exploring a value chain using a basic architecture of data flow by James Urquhart. Dec 22, 2016.

    • Courses

  • User Strategy Development with Wardley Maps in Miro - Tricia Bagley, Coursera Project Network.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Feb 15th - Feb 21st, 2021
item.description:
Maps in the Wild

  • Some initial thoughts about ERP systems - Jan 23, 2020.
  • The Art of Strategy - A curated atlas of Wardley mapping examples. Mar 6, 2019 - Present.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Dec 21st - Dec 27th, 2020
item.description:
Workshops

  • Workshop Building Block - New Year's Eve Party - Help workshop participants gain confidence in mapping in a business-neutral environment.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Nov 30th - Dec 6th, 2020
item.description:
Apps

Mapping

  • OnlineWardleyMapsstars97 - Online open source mapping tool. For updates follow @MapsAsCode on Twitter. Hosted version available here. Online documentation Wardley Maps as Code.

    • Maps in the Wild

  • Broaden the scope of the SUT - Understanding how test strategies are based on the underlying landscape. Apr 19, 2019

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2020
item.description:
Apps

Mapping

  • Wardley Maps for Jupyter Notebooks (ipywardley)stars5 - A plugin for generating Wardley maps in Jupyter Notebooks.
  • Wardley Maps for Visual Studio Code - Render and edit Wardley maps within Visual Studio Code. This VSCode extention leverages the engine from OnlineWardleyMaps.com. Online documentation Wardley Maps as Code.

    • Templates

  • Wardley Mapping Tools and Techniques - A semi-serious reflection on the problem space of tools for mapping, and an overview of all sorts of mapping tools and techniques.

    • Templates

    Mapping

  • Wardley Maps in draw.io - How-to guide with animations and a collection of open source Wardley map icons.
  • Office 365 Wardley Mapping Templates - Templates for Microsoft Visio and PowerPoint.
  • Miro Wardley Mapping Template - How-to guide on mapping using this template.
  • Figma Mapping Template - A mapping template for Figma.
  • wardley-omnigrafflestars14 - Wardley mapping stencils for OmniGraffle.
  • Wardley Maps in LaTeXstars3 - Figures 8 and 11 from the book by Simon Wardley to demonstrate drawing Wardley maps in LaTeX.
  • yEd Palettestars11 - Wardley maps palette for yEd.

    • Templates

    Doctrine Assessement

  • Doctrine Grid Tool - Based on Google Forms and Google Sheets.

    • Events

  • Map Camp 2020 - A free all-day online event on October 13, 2020.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Oct 19th - Oct 25th, 2020
item.description:
Maps in the Wild

  • Digital Sovereignty - Look before you leap. Oct 22, 2020.
  • Me versus We - Off the beaten track — pivot. Mar 27, 2020.
  • On the diversity of values - On the inclusive and exclusive nature of values. Feb 24, 2020.
  • From HS2 to China and … back again - On the changing world of geopolitics. Feb 23, 2020.
  • Embedded in memory - Cultural cycles. Oct 2, 2019.
  • Exploring value - Values, resilience, principles, enablement systems. Oct 1, 2019.
  • From values to rituals - Sep 9, 2019.
  • Exploring Brexit - The first rule of Brexit is “you’re wrong”. Sep 5, 2019.
  • Exploring Culture - Mapping Culture. Sep 4, 2019.
  • What culture is right for you? - Jul 31, 2019.
  • What is an expert? - Oct 31, 2018.
  • Near field, far field and the crazy ideas - My future career as a Harmony Designer. Jan 17, 2017.
  • Something that will change the world of competition - Dec 1, 2016.
  • The map is not the territory - Nov 24, 2016.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Sep 21st - Sep 27th, 2020
item.description:
Reading

  • Reaching Cloud Velocity: A Leader's Guide to Success in the AWS Cloud - Chapter 2.3 Mapping Your Way Through.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Sep 14th - Sep 20th, 2020
item.description:
Maps in the Wild

  • Doctrine or Dogma? - Challenge your Wardley mapping assumptions in a friendly way. Aug 2, 2020.
  • How to use Wardley Mapping to understand how you deliver customer value - Sep 15, 2020.
  • The What, The Why and Some How of Wardley Mapping - A conversation with Simon Wardley. Aug 4, 2020.
  • Estratégia com Wardley Maps - Jun 7, 2020.

    • Courses

  • GCATI - Globally recognised Wardley mapping training and certifications; Awareness, Foundation, Practitioner, Strategy Development Workshop and Wardley Mapping BattleCamp.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Jul 27th - Aug 2nd, 2020
item.description:
Videos

  • Wardley Maps BarCamp 2020 - Over 10 hours of presentations by 17 speakers.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Jul 20th - Jul 26th, 2020
item.description:
Maps in the Wild

  • How to Introduce Wardley Mapping to Different Strata of the Organization - What is the best way to introduce Wardley Mapping to different groups? Jul 22, 2020.
  • Thoughts on 'value' in the Value Chain - It is important to understand the need and outcome. It is vital to understand the value desired. Jul 17, 2020.

    • Reading

  • The Art of Strategy - Sun Tzu, Boyd & Wardley on situational awareness, OODA "Loops" and Wardley mapping by Erik Schön. PDF/Paperback.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Jul 6th - Jul 12th, 2020
item.description:
Apps

Mapping

  • Go-Wardleystars16 - Generates a Wardley map in SVG format from a HCL-based map description file.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Jun 15th - Jun 21st, 2020
item.description:
Maps in the Wild

  • Guest post: mapping the way to a strategy - GOV.UK Government Digital Service. 16 Apr, 2014.
  • Would you survive the loss of your phone? - How to use Wardley mapping to increase resilience using personal security as an example. Jun 18, 2020.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Jun 1st - Jun 7th, 2020
item.description:
Maps in the Wild

  • Wenn Customizing zur Legacy wird - Analyse eines ERP-Systems mit Wardley Maps und strategischem Domain-driven Design. Jun 2, 2020.
  • Building a working map of Ethereum 1.0 - 10,000 feet view of Ethereum's user needs and capabilities. Aug 13, 2019.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps May 25th - May 31st, 2020
item.description:
Maps in the Wild

  • Context, Situation, Components, PaaS, Dead or Alive … it's all semantics isn't it? - tl;dr Caveat Emptor. Feb 4, 2014.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps May 18th - May 24th, 2020
item.description:
Maps in the Wild

  • On user needs and listening to customers - Simon Wardley focuses on one of the most important parts of mapping - the anchor. April 11, 2016.
  • Simon Wardley's 100-day Corporate get fit plan - For the newly-appointed executive, to help get you into a position from which you can start to learn and talk about strategy. Aug 21, 2015.

    • Quick Start

  • Getting Strategic on Peace and Justice - An engaging animation by Sue Borchardt (5:39).

    • Reading

  • Practical Introduction to Wardley Mapping - A step-by-step guide to creating and using Wardley Maps by E. Alex Hudson. PDF/iPad/Kindle.

    • Meetups

  • Australia
    • Melbourne

    • Videos

  • Wardley Maps on Vimeo - Talks by Simon Wardley and the Wardley mapping community.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps May 11th - May 17th, 2020
item.description:
Maps in the Wild

  • Your story never had a chance - Gameplay, fractal patterns, feedback loops, doctrine. May 9, 2020.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Apr 27th - May 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Maps in the Wild

  • Other tools I use with mapping - Simon Wardley discusses some of the other tools he uses with mapping. Mar 6, 2015.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Apr 13th - Apr 19th, 2020
item.description:
Maps in the Wild

  • Mapping the blog - Applying Wardley maps to personal blog user needs. Apr 20, 2020.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Apr 6th - Apr 12th, 2020
item.description:
Maps in the Wild

  • Evolving Enterprise Collaboration To Digital Ecosystems - Oct 17, 2015.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Mar 30th - Apr 5th, 2020
item.description:
Maps in the Wild

  • Research Skills Framework - The RSF Map and Mapping Kit build upon Simon Wardley's maps. Retrieved Mar 30, 2020.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Mar 16th - Mar 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Apps

Mapping

  • MapScript - Note MapScript is built on Observable. Read their Terms of Service. MapScript feature requests. Hosted version available here.

    • Maps in the Wild

  • Map Your Improvement Strategy - Because that expert you hired has no magical bullets. Nov 4, 2019.
  • The power of situational awareness for digital government - Part 2 Mark Thompson outlines a digital vision to make government a more cohesive, integrated organisation. Oct 9, 2015.
  • Time to get mapping - how a blind government can develop sight - Part 1 Mark Thompson outlines a digital vision to make government a more cohesive, integrated organisation. Oct 9, 2015.

    • Meetups

  • North America
    • USA
      • California
        • San Diego

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Feb 17th - Feb 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Maps in the Wild

  • A mechanism for building a roadmap - Using a Wardley map to build a roadmap. Jan 9, 2018.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Feb 10th - Feb 16th, 2020
item.description:
Maps in the Wild

  • Mapping Alignment - Looking across teams and strata in an organisation and the practices used to meet organisational needs like alignment, reporting, etc. Feb 9, 2020.
  • Blockchain brokers trust in a fragmented world - Wardley mapping shows blockchain is following the same maturity evolution as other mainstream technologies. 28 Jan, 2020.

    • Videos

  • Map Camp London 2019 - Watch presentations and video recordings on InfoQ.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Feb 3rd - Feb 9th, 2020
item.description:
Maps in the Wild

  • An illustration from Gerstner's book - Part 2 - Mapping "Who Says Elephants Can't Dance" by Louis Gerstner. Jun 18, 2019.
  • Research heresies - Three ways to think about user needs and user research and how Wardley maps can help us think about where to do user research. Nov 2, 2018.
  • A Platform Design Example Explained - Exploring and designing a platform in the renewable energy context. Oct 28, 2019.
  • Understanding Platforms through Value Chain Maps - Why is a Platforms' Wardley (Value Chain) Map Z-Shaped? Oct 11, 2018.
  • Mapping Crypto: Common Pitfalls - Mapping the challenges of launching novel payment solutions. Jun 14, 2019.
  • Mapping Crypto: A Primer - Understanding the crypto ecosystem through Wardley maps. Jun 2, 2019.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Jan 27th - Feb 2nd, 2020
item.description:
Quick Start

  • My basics for business strategy - In 11 diagrams by Simon Wardley.

    • Research Papers

  • Building Situational Awareness in the Age of Service Ecosystems - Pujadas, R; Thompson, M; Venters, W; et al. March 2019.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Jan 20th - Jan 26th, 2020
item.description:
Workshops

  • Wardley Maps Battle Campstars26 - Workshop rules, cards and materials.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Jan 13th - Jan 19th, 2020
item.description:
Community

  • #WardleyMaps - Join the conversation.
  • Mapping Maps Newsletter - Subscribe here. Newsletter archive.

    • Maps in the Wild

  • Structural Deepening - Using Wardley maps to look at the evolution of the jet engine. Jan 5, 2020.
  • Plotting a path to a greener web with Wardley mapping - The Green Web Foundation. Mar 20, 2019.
  • UN Global Platform - Handbook on Information Technology Strategy - Covers the development of your IT strategy using Wardley Maps to predict the future, understand which methodologies are best suited to developing and delivery information management systems. Download the Wardley map source files used to create the Handbook on IT Strategy. Mar 13, 2019.
  • UN Privacy Preserving Techniques Handbook - Two use cases: giving NSOs access to new sources of (sensitive) Big Data; and enabling Big Data Collaborations Across Multiple NSO. Download Wardley maps slide deck. Mar 12, 2019.
  • Burja Mapping - Combines Samo Burja's Empire Theory with a form of mapping similar to that pioneered by Simon Wardley. Jan 2, 2019.
  • Rebooting GDS - How to stop the organisation from actively harming itself by focusing on doctrine and spend control. Oct 30, 2018.
  • Healthcare information technology strategy - How can we make best use of technology to support healthcare? Jul 19, 2018.
  • Mapping Maturity - Context specific maturity models with Wardley maps informed by Cynefin. May 11, 2018.
  • Designing for constant evolution - Pioneer, Settler and Town Planner (Wardley PST). Jan 31, 2017.
  • Thank you Amazon. Boom! Everything in business will change - Dec 3, 2016.
  • Amazon is eating the software (which is eating the world) - Nov 30, 2016.
  • Why the fuss about serverless? - Evolution and co-evolution of architectural practice and worth based development. Nov 23, 2016.

    • Research Papers

  • Mapping Practice Papers - A series of position papers published by the Leading Edge Forum. Jun 13, 2018 - Jan 28, 2019.

    • Reading

  • Bits or pieces? - Simon Wardley's blog.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Jan 6th - Jan 12th, 2020
item.description:
Meetups

  • Europe
    • Belgium
      • Antwerp
    • Czech Republic
      • Prague
    • France
      • Paris
    • Germany
      • Cologne
      • Hamburg
      • Munich
    • Netherlands
      • Amsterdam
    • Norway
      • Oslo
    • Serbia
      • Belgrade
    • Spain
      • Barcelona - Organizational Change - Wardley Maps
      • Barcelona - Wardley Maps Strategy
    • Switzerland
      • Basel
    • UK
      • London

    • Reading

  • Glossary

    • Apps

    Doctrine Assessement

  • Doctrinestars29 - A simple tool for visualising how competitive a company is in light of Wardley's doctrine. Hosted version available here.

    • Quick Start

  • Investing in innovation - How situational awareness can put your business on the map (5:51).

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Nov 25th - Dec 1st, 2019
item.description:
Courses

  • LearnWardleyMapping.com - Video chapter summaries of Simon Wardley's book, 15-minute introductory course, and a quick reference.

    • Reading

  • Wardley maps - Topographical intelligence in business - Creative Commons book by Simon Wardley.
    • E-book - PDF and Kindle downloads.
    • Audiobook - MP3 downloads.
    • Spanish Translation - Mapas de Wardley. El uso de la inteligencia topográfica en la estrategia empresarial.

    • Events

  • Map Camp - Follow Map Camp on Twitter and LinkedIn.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Nov 18th - Nov 24th, 2019
item.description:
Reading

  • Wardleypedia - A Wiki Encyclopedia dedicated to the strategy mapping techniques pioneered by Simon Wardley.
  • Wardley map - Wikipedia entry.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Nov 11th - Nov 17th, 2019
item.description:
Videos

  • Wardley Maps - Community YouTube channel and playlists.

item.title: wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps Jul 29th - Aug 4th, 2019
item.description:
Community

  • Wardley Mapping Forum - A place to discuss everything connected with Wardley Maps.
  • mapcamp.slack.com - Join Map Camp on Slack here.
  • LinkedIn Group - Wardley Maps Community.

    • Courses

  • Wardley Mapping - Learn how to stimulate future ideas and strategies with the Leading Edge Forum.
